summary: Provision new DataSync transfer tasks between existing locations. Greenfield today (no task exists yet in this estate) — the create stands up the task against two already-provisioned aws_datasync_location_* resources; the locations themselves and include/exclude filters are engineer follow-ups.

operations.title: Provision a new DataSync task
operations.summary: Request a brand-new data transfer task between two existing locations; an engineer finalizes and reviews the Terraform before it applies.
operations.description: Stand up a transfer task as a complete specification: source/destination locations, schedule, and transfer options. Both locations must already exist as aws_datasync_location_* resources. Submitting routes it to an engineer with a draft Terraform block to review and finish — nothing is applied without review.

params.name: task_name
params.label: Task name
params.help: Names the task in the DataSync console and the generated draft.

params.name: source_location_arn
params.label: Source location ARN
params.help: The ARN of an existing aws_datasync_location_* resource (S3, NFS, SMB, EFS, FSx, HDFS, object storage) to read from.

params.name: destination_location_arn
params.label: Destination location ARN
params.help: The ARN of an existing aws_datasync_location_* resource to write to.

params.name: task_mode
params.label: Task mode
params.help: ENHANCED scales to larger datasets/file counts and supports task reporting; BASIC is the classic mode.

params.name: cloudwatch_log_group_arn
params.label: CloudWatch log group
params.help: Destination for the task's transfer logs.

params.name: schedule_expression
params.label: Schedule (cron)
params.help: Leave blank to run the task on demand only. AWS cron syntax, e.g. cron(0 0 * * ? *).

params.name: verify_mode
params.label: Verification mode
params.help: How thoroughly DataSync verifies data integrity after the transfer.

params.name: transfer_mode
params.label: Transfer mode
params.help: CHANGED only transfers new/modified files on repeated runs.

params.name: overwrite_mode
params.label: Overwrite mode
params.help: NEVER preserves files that already exist at the destination.

params.name: preserve_deleted_files
params.label: Preserve deleted files
params.help: REMOVE deletes destination files no longer present at the source.

params.name: log_level
params.label: Log level
params.help: TRANSFER logs every file transferred; requires the CloudWatch log group above.

params.name: resource_name
params.label: Name tag
params.help: Shown as the name everywhere — consoles, tickets, this portal.

params.name: description_tag
params.label: What this task transfers
params.help: One line an operator can act on at 3 AM.

params.name: pic
params.label: Person in charge
params.help: Who to call about this task.

decisions: source_location_arn and destination_location_arn must already exist — provisioning the matching aws_datasync_location_* resource (S3, NFS, SMB, EFS, FSx, HDFS, object storage) is a prerequisite engineer follow-up; this form does not create locations.
Include/exclude filters and a task report destination beyond CloudWatch logging are engineer follow-ups.
